zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell是Robert Furnell的女兒，於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓。她於1149年與Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell是Robert Furnell的女儿，于大约1120年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓。她于1149年与Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1176年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Furnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

variants.name: Furneaux
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell was born about 1120, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Furnell. She married Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell in 1149, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1176, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell est née environ 1120, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Furnell. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell en 1149, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1176, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell wurde um 1120 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Furnell geboren. Sie hat 1149 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1176 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell è nata il circa 1120 nel Drayton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Furnell. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell nel 1149, nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1176, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnellは約1120年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでRobert Furnellの娘として生まれた。1149年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムでSir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年にフランスピカーディソンメで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell(은)는 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Robert Furnell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1149년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Robert Furnell. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell em 1149, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1176, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell родилась около 1120 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Furnell. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell в 1149 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1176 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Matilda Furnell nació aproximadamente 1120, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Robert Furnell. Se casó con Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell en 1149, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1176, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
